reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate WEM Portal
reauth_confirm.description: Logging in to the WEM Portal failed repeatedly. Re-enter your credentials to continue.

error.wrong_account: The username does not match this account. Re-authentication keeps the same account; only the password can be changed.

menu_options.discover_modules: Discover expert parameters from the portal

data.expert_write_enabled: Expert write access via web (default = off)
data.expert_module_arg: Module menu index (only used when module select is enabled; empty = 6 = heat pump)
data.expert_auto_poll_enabled: Poll expert parameters periodically (default = off). Note: polling too frequently can trigger a temporary block (403) from the portal.
data.expert_slot_1_id: Expert parameter 1: entityvalue (hex ID, e.g. 3A7F91C2E0B48D5619F2A0C7B4E83D105C2A, optional)
data.expert_slot_2_id: Expert parameter 2: entityvalue (hex ID, e.g. 3A7F91C2E0B48D5619F2A0C7B4E83D105C2A, optional)
data.expert_slot_3_id: Expert parameter 3: entityvalue (hex ID, e.g. 3A7F91C2E0B48D5619F2A0C7B4E83D105C2A, optional)
data.expert_slot_4_id: Expert parameter 4: entityvalue (hex ID, e.g. 3A7F91C2E0B48D5619F2A0C7B4E83D105C2A, optional)
data.expert_slot_5_id: Expert parameter 5: entityvalue (hex ID, e.g. 3A7F91C2E0B48D5619F2A0C7B4E83D105C2A, optional)
data.expert_slot_6_id: Expert parameter 6: entityvalue (hex ID, e.g. 3A7F91C2E0B48D5619F2A0C7B4E83D105C2A, optional)
data.expert_slot_7_id: Expert parameter 7: entityvalue (hex ID, e.g. 3A7F91C2E0B48D5619F2A0C7B4E83D105C2A, optional)
data.expert_slot_8_id: Expert parameter 8: entityvalue (hex ID, e.g. 3A7F91C2E0B48D5619F2A0C7B4E83D105C2A, optional)
data.expert_slot_9_id: Expert parameter 9: entityvalue (hex ID, e.g. 3A7F91C2E0B48D5619F2A0C7B4E83D105C2A, optional)
data.expert_slot_10_id: Expert parameter 10: entityvalue (hex ID, e.g. 3A7F91C2E0B48D5619F2A0C7B4E83D105C2A, optional)
data.expert_enable_module_nav: ⚠ Enable module select (default = off). Note: normally unnecessary - only enable this if you know what you are doing.
data.expert_enable_security_code: ⚠ Enable security-code step (default = off). Note: normally unnecessary - only enable this if you know what you are doing.
data.expert_notify_on_success: Show a notification after a successful expert write (default = off; failures are always reported)

discover_modules.title: Discover expert parameters
discover_modules.description: Select which modules to search. This opens a short portal session; searching many modules increases the risk of a temporary block (403).

data.refresh: Reload the module list from the portal (rarely needed - the list is cached, and an extra portal login right after the first one can trigger a 403 block)

error.invalid_entityvalue: Invalid entityvalue ID: must be a long hex string (0-9, A-F only; typically 36 characters). Short values like 0 are not a valid ID.
error.invalid_module_arg: Invalid module menu index: digits only (e.g. 6). Leave empty to use the default.
error.duplicate_entityvalue: This parameter is already selected in another slot. Each expert parameter can be used only once.
error.discovery_failed: Could not read from the portal. Try again later (the portal may be temporarily rate-limited).
error.discovery_blocked: Portal access is currently paused after a 403 (rate limit) - no request was sent. Wait about 15 minutes and try again, without ticking the reload option.
error.discovery_empty: The search ran, but the selected module(s) returned no readable parameters. Try another module, or enter the entityvalue manually.

abort.no_changes: No changes to save - the integration was not reloaded.
